mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approvals (status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT a.id, a.status, a.created_at, a.updated_at FROM approvals a JOIN approval_signs s ON a.id = s.approval_id WHERE s.target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
